CVE-2021-42522.title: There is a Information Disclosure vulnerability in anjuta/plugins ...
CVE-2021-42522.summary: There is a Information Disclosure vulnerability in anjuta/plugins/document-manager/anjuta-bookmarks.c. This issue was caused by the incorrect use of libxml2 API. The vendor forgot to call 'g_free()' to release the return value of 'xmlGetProp()'.
